summary: No matches were confirmed to be actively live at 13:10 UTC. The Sheffield Shield final is scheduled to start on March 26th. A Chandigarh T20 match was listed for today, but the scheduled time appears to have passed or is not currently live. No matches were found for the AFC U20 Asian Cup.
